# default()

**Type Method**

A convenience method for creating the default IPv4 route.

## Declaration

```swift
class func `default`() -> NEIPv4Route
```

## Return Value

An [doc://com.apple.networkextension/documentation/NetworkExtension/NEIPv4Route] object containing the default IPv4 route.

## Discussion

Set this route in the `includedRoutes` array in the [doc://com.apple.networkextension/documentation/NetworkExtension/NEIPv4Settings] object to specify that all IPv4 network traffic be routed to the TUN interface by default.

## Creating an IPv4 Route

- **init(destinationAddress:subnetMask:)**: Initialize the [doc://com.apple.networkextension/documentation/NetworkExtension/NEIPv4Route] object.
